news.paragraph: Silver is trading near recent highs as traders assess the geopolitical implications of the Iran deal and ongoing inflation concerns. While gold has seen modest gains, the outlook for silver remains tied to broader commodity trends and investor sentiment towards safe-haven assets. The market is awaiting further clarity on inflation data and central bank policy.

headlines.title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
